name: io.github.karldane/newrelic-mcp
title: New Relic MCP
description: Comprehensive MCP server for the New Relic observability platform with 55 tools covering APM, alerts, dashboards, synthetics, workflows, notifications, service levels, tags, entities, and workloads.

environmentVariables.name: NEWRELIC_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: New Relic API key (User or Admin)

packageArguments.name: -write-enabled
packageArguments.description: Enable write operations (create, update, delete resources)
